text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing the G1 race in Fuchu, we're
planning for the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When suddenly, Agnes Tachyon receives a formal
invitation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm? The Gekkei Hai?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
The Gekkei Hai is an exhibition race showcasing
the most popular Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Expectations are gathering for the monumental
race which will feature a live broadcast and an
opening ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Gekkei Hai takes its name from the bay
laurel. Symbolically, it represents both victory
and honor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
These are virtues I wish all participating
Umamusume will strive for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In other words, while the Gekkei Hai may be an
exhibition race in name...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My intentions were to establish a prestigious
event, rivaling the G1 races, where talented
racers representing each of their generations
would gather.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Well said! May I inquire the reason behind
establishing such a reputable event?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The idea is to further stimulate competition
throughout the Umamusume world. That is why it
stands at the same level as the G1 races and is
being held during the summer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The other reason concerns the racers themselves.
It can easily be said that Umamusume are diverse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There are those who have talent but struggle to
exert their full capability. Likewise, there are
many who struggle to believe in themselves.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
While this might come off as heavy-handed, it is
my hope that they utilize this opportunity to
experience how it feels to race with every fiber of
their being.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I genuinely believe that opportunities like this are
instrumental for the future of not only those
individual Umamusume, but for us as a whole.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The future of Umamusume? Heh-heh! Once again,
the president is on to some fascinating stuff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coincidentally, Agnes Tachyon and I are watching
a broadcast of the Gekkei Hai when she receives
her invitation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just as they said, they gathered quite the
formidable lineup, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The race looks to be promising.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tentative lists of the participating racers are
already being featured in racing magazines with
the coverage printed in full color.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not an exaggeration to say this is the most
anticipated event in Umamusume racing right
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to assure Agnes Tachyon that she'll do well in
the race, but she remains unconvinced.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Competing with those at the top is the key to
drawing out one's own latent potential. Yes, I've
heard this mentioned numerous times.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Give me a day to think about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Saying that, she leaves my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day you get a racetrack all to
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, the Gekkei Hai... I couldn't ask for a better
place to gather data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have to make my choice, it's either Plan A or
Plan B!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon begins running, a lone and silent
silhouette against the nighttime racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: (Come on! Run faster! Faster! Faster!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heh-heh, heh-heh-heh! I've known this ever
since the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The latent potential within an Umamusume's legs!
The limits of this body's speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've yet to see even a glimpse of either, for I know
that they lie beyond the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A fine goal, if I do say so myself...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, if that limit can be observed,
it doesn't need to be with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(...I'll run in the Gekkei Hai. Not only that, I'll
make sure Plan B is a success.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! I have something to tell you.
Good news, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She proclaims her intention to run in the Gekkei
Hai.
